panel.models-tooltip: Switch the model used for new replies
panel.context-hint: Earlier conversation may still be in the agent's context — type to continue.

settings.nixos-hint: Peer configuration (pubkey, relays, display name) is managed by the NixOS module — see services.opencrow-chat in your config.
settings.history-limit-description: Messages kept in the panel's in-memory mirror (sqlite keeps everything).
